claim_enablement_requirement: independently calibrated localization, membrane, channel-density, endpoint and detection-limit parameters with predeclared thresholds

hypotheses.H3a: direct WSS versus signed-force and exposure pathways
hypotheses.H3b: held-out WSS surrogate versus actual force pathways
hypotheses.H4: anisotropic versus isotropic signed-force and exposure pathways
hypotheses.H5: full versus h<=2 force pathways using transient current and calcium endpoints
hypotheses.H6: artery specificity from multifeature current/calcium response
hypotheses.H7: persistence in generalized-SLS and elastic limits

mechanics.parameterization_status: literature-constrained reference; uncertainty propagation required for inference
